chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1847 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 29.05.2025 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General along with Kashif Hussain Memon, Assistant Education Officer (Primary) Ghotki at Mirpur Mathelo, Zahid Hussain, Executive Engineer, Education Works, Ghotki and Saleem Ahmed Shaikh, Chief Engineer Education Region, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Compliance report filed by Respondent No.10 is taken on record. He also submits NIT dated 18.02.2025 wherein the subject School is available at Serial No.13. Counsel for the petitioner submits that construction work is under progress at the site; hence he does not press the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
